_meta.description: Curated HTA assessment data for drugs where live scraping is unreliable. Entries here supplement (not replace) live-scraped data. When an adapter returns no results for a substance+country, these entries are used as fallback.
_meta.format: Keyed by lowercase active substance (INN). Each substance maps country codes to a list of AssessmentResult-compatible objects.

GB.evaluation_reason: Avelumab for maintenance treatment of locally advanced or metastatic urothelial carcinoma after platinum-based chemotherapy
GB.summary_en: NICE Technology appraisal guidance: Recommended | TA788

GB.evaluation_reason: Avelumab with axitinib for untreated advanced renal cell carcinoma
GB.summary_en: NICE Technology appraisal guidance: Recommended | TA645

DE.evaluation_reason: Lokal fortgeschrittenes oder metastasiertes Urothelkarzinom: Erstlinien-Erhaltungstherapie bei Erwachsenen, deren Erkrankung nach platinhaltiger Chemotherapie nicht fortgeschritten ist
DE.patient_group: Erwachsene mit lokal fortgeschrittenem oder metastasiertem Urothelkarzinom, deren Erkrankung nach einer platinhaltigen Chemotherapie nicht fortgeschritten ist
DE.summary_en: Population: Adults with locally advanced or metastatic urothelial carcinoma (1L maintenance after platinum chemo) | Added benefit: Non-quantifiable added benefit (nicht quantifizierbar) | Evidence: Hint (Anhaltspunkt) | vs. Best supportive care

DE.evaluation_reason: Nierenzellkarzinom: Erstlinientherapie des fortgeschrittenen Nierenzellkarzinoms in Kombination mit Axitinib
DE.patient_group: Erwachsene mit fortgeschrittenem Nierenzellkarzinom (RCC) ohne vorherige systemische Therapie
DE.summary_en: Population: Adults with advanced RCC (1L, in combination with axitinib) | Added benefit: Non-quantifiable added benefit (nicht quantifizierbar) | Evidence: Hint (Anhaltspunkt) | vs. Sunitinib

DE.evaluation_reason: Merkelzellkarzinom: Behandlung von Erwachsenen mit metastasiertem Merkelzellkarzinom
DE.comparator: Patientenindividuelle Therapie nach Maßgabe des Arztes
DE.summary_en: Population: Adults with metastatic Merkel cell carcinoma | Added benefit: Non-quantifiable added benefit (nicht quantifizierbar) | Evidence: Hint (Anhaltspunkt) | vs. Physician's choice

ES.evaluation_reason: Avelumab (Bavencio) en el tratamiento de mantenimiento del carcinoma urotelial localmente avanzado o metastásico
Avelumab (Bavencio) en combinación con axitinib para el carcinoma de células renales avanzado

JP.evaluation_reason: Merkel cell carcinoma — treatment of unresectable Merkel cell carcinoma
JP.summary_en: PMDA approved (2017). NHI-listed. Indication: Unresectable Merkel cell carcinoma.

JP.evaluation_reason: Renal cell carcinoma — first-line treatment in combination with axitinib for advanced renal cell carcinoma
JP.summary_en: PMDA approved (2019). NHI-listed. Indication: Advanced renal cell carcinoma (1L, with axitinib).

JP.evaluation_reason: Urothelial carcinoma — maintenance treatment of locally advanced or metastatic urothelial carcinoma after platinum-based chemotherapy
JP.summary_en: PMDA approved (2021). NHI-listed. Indication: Locally advanced or metastatic urothelial carcinoma (1L maintenance after platinum chemo).

FR.evaluation_reason: Inscription — traitement d'entretien en monothérapie du carcinome urothélial localement avancé ou métastatique
FR.smr_description: Le service médical rendu par BAVENCIO est important dans le traitement d'entretien du carcinome urothélial localement avancé ou métastatique.
FR.asmr_description: BAVENCIO apporte une amélioration du service médical rendu mineure (ASMR IV) dans la stratégie thérapeutique du traitement d'entretien du carcinome urothélial.
FR.summary_en: SMR: Important | ASMR IV (minor improvement) | Urothelial carcinoma maintenance monotherapy

FR.evaluation_reason: Inscription — traitement en association avec axitinib du carcinome à cellules rénales avancé
FR.smr_description: Le service médical rendu par BAVENCIO en association avec axitinib est important dans le traitement du carcinome à cellules rénales avancé.
FR.asmr_description: BAVENCIO en association avec axitinib apporte une amélioration du service médical rendu modérée (ASMR III) dans le carcinome à cellules rénales avancé.
FR.summary_en: SMR: Important | ASMR III (moderate improvement) | Advanced renal cell carcinoma (with axitinib)
